political.s: FEC: $31K PAC donations; 68% to Republican, 32% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $26M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.06% of revenue) via Travelers Foundation. Operates the Travelers Foundation: $5.9M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).
charity.focus: Education (K-12 and higher ed), affordable housing, arts and culture, community development

environment.s: Insure Our Future 2024 scorecard: 1.1/10 (weak). Sub-scores: coal underwriting limited; oil & gas underwriting very-weak. Travelers: limited coal exclusions; no oil and gas underwriting restrictions; among the US insurers with the weakest climate policies.

execPay.s: NAIC Complaint Index 0.83 (near the 1.00 US peer average).

sample.filer: Maitong Sunshine Cultural Development Co., Ltd  (MGSD)  (CIK 0002003750)

wiki.extract: The Travelers Companies, Inc., commonly known as Travelers, is an American multinational insurance company. It is the second-largest writer of U.S. commercial property and casualty insurance, and the sixth-largest writer of U.S. personal insurance through independent agents. Travelers is incorporated in Minnesota, with headquarters in New York City, and its largest office in Hartford, Connecticut. It has been a component of the Dow Jones Industrial Average since June 8, 2009.

sampleRecords.nature: Cerebral and other intracranial hemorrhages without skull fracture
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level from collapsing structure or equipment  6 to 30 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was climbing a fixed ladder to gain access to the roof for an inspection. The bolts holding the ladder to the wall broke, resulting in the ladder and the employee falling approximately 14 feet to the ground. The employee sustained a concussion and a brain bleed as well as fractured ribs and was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level 6 to 10 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was climbing a ladder to inspect a roof when they fell 8-10 feet to the pavement. They sustained fractures to the left foot and right wrist as well as a possible right foot fracture.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped on a wet floor in a building while walking toward the exit. The employee fell, suffering a broken kneecap.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level 6 to 10 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On March 6, at approximately 2:30 p.m., an employee climbed up a ladder to inspect a roof. The ladder slid sideways, and the employee fell 10 feet to the driveway. The employee sustained a fractured left elbow and was hospitalized.
